description_long: This is a compact, side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a short, gold-toned metal barrel and a dark wooden grip. The barrels are parallel and feature a slightly aged, textured finish, giving the weapon a vintage or antique appearance. The receiver and trigger guard are also gold-toned, with the guard being elongated and rounded, enclosing two distinct triggers. The grip is smoothly contoured, made of dark wood, and ergonomically shaped for a secure hold. The overall design is robust and functional, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing utility and durability. The shotgun's compact size suggests it is intended for close-quarters use, such as in urban environments or for personal defense.
description: A compact, vintage-style side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with gold-toned metal and a dark wooden grip. Features an elongated trigger guard and a short, robust design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two parallel barrels with gold-toned finish and dark openings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the short double barrels, gold-toned receiver, elongated trigger guard, and dark wooden grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the contoured wooden grip and the tops of the two barrels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the double barrels, gold-toned receiver, and wooden grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel; both barrels are of equal length and closely aligned with no visible ribbing or venting.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard enclosing two triggers, with a smooth and continuous outline and no finger grooves.
